metadata.title: Hark! The Herald Angels Sing
metadata.subtitle: Charles Wesley (1739) + Mendelssohn tune (1840)
metadata.composer: Felix Mendelssohn (1809–1847), tune from "Festgesang" (1840), adapted by William H. Cummings
metadata.lyricist: Charles Wesley (1707–1788), with revisions by George Whitefield (1714–1770) and others
metadata.x_pd_basis: Wesley's text (d. 1788) and Mendelssohn's tune (d. 1847) are PD by > 150 years
metadata.x_translator: N/A (English original) — paired with 天にはさかえ (Japanese, 1891)
